How many active users signed up last month? Query the analytics DB.
Running the query.

function.name: sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()-interval '1 month') AND created_at < date_trunc('month', now()) AND status='active'"}

content: 8,421 active users signed up last month.
